title: Verify spend-pool catalogue lifecycle
preconditions: A fresh Ledger plus unique, duplicate, referenced, archived, and reactivation pool inputs and independent account, instrument, cardholder, and category records.
steps: Exercise every acceptance criterion of FR-LEDGER-SPEND-POOL-CATALOGUE through the public CLI and inspect stable identities, lifecycle filters, assignment counts, and all independent dimensions.
expected: Pool create, rename, archive, reactivate, and list behavior is stable and attributable; references survive lifecycle changes; no other dimension is inferred or mutated.
